name: BEN_EXTRACT_REQUEST
description: This table holds information for each run of the extract  process for a given carrier.

columns.Name: EXT_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the extract request.

columns.Name: LAYOUT_ID
columns.Comments: TEMPLATE_ID

columns.Name: CARRIER_ID
columns.Comments: CARRIER_ID

columns.Name: REQUEST_DATE
columns.Comments: EFFECTIVE_DATE

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: STATUS_FLAG
columns.Comments: STATUS_FLAG

columns.Name: EXTRACT_OPTION
columns.Comments: EXTRACT_OPTION

columns.Name: EXTRACT_TYPE
columns.Comments: EXTRACT_TYPE

columns.Name: TOTAL_EMPLOYEES
columns.Comments: Total number of employees processed under this request.

columns.Name: TOTAL_DEPENDENTS
columns.Comments: Total number of dependents processed under this request.

columns.Name: TOTAL_PLANS
columns.Comments: Total number of plans processed under this request.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ROWS
columns.Comments: Total number of detail records for this request.

columns.Name: CARRIER_RESPONSE
columns.Comments: Identifies the response received from the plan carrier for this request.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_SUCCESSFUL_TRNSMDT
columns.Comments: Timestamp of when this request was last successfully transmitted.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: User entered comments

columns.Name: TRANSMISSION_LOG
columns.Comments: Messages generated while transmitting the file

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
